title: EDEN wire — claim response
description: Response body for a successful POST /v0/experiments/{E}/tasks/{T}/claim. See 07-wire-protocol.md §2.3; the `claim` object matches task.schema.json §3.4. The pre-12a-1 `token` field has been removed (claim ownership is now identity-keyed via worker_id).

worker_id.description: Opaque, system-minted worker identifier of the claimant (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §1.6).

expires_at.description: Optional — omitted from the response when absent; never emitted as explicit null (aligned with the NotNone discipline used across eden-contracts).
